category_sources: source_facts.description identifies herdr as an agent multiplexer that lives in the terminal; official docs describe it as a terminal-native agent runtime and multiplexer.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives herdr; source_facts.homepage is the official herdr.dev site.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official site; https://herdr.dev/docs/ is the dedicated official documentation path.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/ogulcancelik/herdr, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states agent multiplexer in terminal; source_facts.executables lists the herdr CLI.
